headline: Refresh the runtime base image to drop the patched node-tar advisories
summary: Repins the runtime base image to the current Chainguard rebuild, which carries npm's patched node-tar and current glibc.

items.title: Runtime base image repinned to the current patched rebuild
items.body: The digest-pinned Chainguard Node base image is advanced to the current rebuild, which ships npm's node-tar 12.0.0-r1 (resolving CVE-2026-59871, CVE-2026-59873, and CVE-2026-59874 — node-tar denial-of-service via a crafted PAX header, gzip bomb, or malformed archive) and glibc 2.43-r11. The base image is pinned by digest for reproducible builds; this bump is the base-OS patch path.
